summary: 0.6.32 simplifies the button 5 behavior: while the override is held, the player disables its own gaze and focus behavior entirely instead of maintaining a special grab-navigation handoff state.
operatorSignals: 0.6.30 and 0.6.31 still felt like they were partially capturing control while button 5 was held.
The requested rule became simpler and clearer: if button 5 is pressed, all player gaze and focus behavior should be completely disabled.
actionsTaken: Removed the extra grab-navigation handoff state from the CUA input module.
Moved the button 5 override check ahead of gaze resolution.
Made the override path simply release player focus and capture and then get out of the way.
nonGoals: No A-B or transport policy changes.
